And then we'll probably have an FAQ. So this selling system used to be, I had different selling processes for different price points, for different promotions. So we had different types of prospects. And so over time, we had a phone selling system, we had an EFT selling system, we had high ticket sales, we had challenge sales, which is a defined end program selling system, and then a conversion selling system, taking someone from a front end to a back end membership. Each of these had different scripts that were similar overall conceptually, but had different tweaks to them to make them specific for that promotion and for that type of prospect. And we had different recordings, different overcomes, all that type of stuff in all these recordings. And so we had a lot of times. Fitness sales is literally like, we live and breathe this, okay? And over time, we were able to consolidate it into a single sale that we call the diagnostic sale. It is the best, it is a single best selling system that I have ever seen when it comes to fitness. It was so successful that when we tested it, the people who were in the test, that we actually had to stop the test and we released it publicly, like immediately, to everyone else in our community. Because our coaches were grabbing the script because they were seeing the people succeed in the beta test and giving it to the people who were struggling and those guys were turning around like overnight. And so as soon as that happened, this became the singular selling process that we use at Jomake. And I'm gonna show you how it works, okay? So the beauty of the diagnostic sale is that you can use any promotion, it's 28 day, six, it doesn't matter what they come in for. Because at the end of the day, no one comes in for a promotion, they come in for a prize. They're coming in for the goal, all right? There's something that they're trying to achieve. No one has a bikini. They want their husband to look at them differently. They want their kids to see them a certain way. They want their friends to think them as the skinny friend. That's what they want. They don't want a 28 day transfer. They don't want a 42 day detox. They don't care. What they want is the end result and that's what we're going to sell them. The reason that's so significant is because it allows you to liquidate the cost of acquisition, it allows you to spend money on ads and immediately recoup it, and the next customer after that, your bottleneck. But that's just the first thing that the diagnostic sale gave us. The next thing is that it's 100% conversion to EFT. And she went from closing $200 to a $1300 average ticket using this selling script. It works, okay? It increases churn. So this is actually like, the goal is that people actually stay healthy, right? That's why we got into this. If you churn by the way we sell, it's massive in terms of how much you're helping people. And so there's three ways that it decreases the churn. When people pay more upfront, they're actually paying down their recurring price. So their contract value is still the same, and collecting more cash or front allows you to liquidate, ad spend, et cetera. But because of that, it's a slightly lower price, so people stay longer. The next thing is that you get the commitment. So imagine if you paid $1,000 down for a month. You'll never cancel that membership because you don't wanna lose your initiation fee. And so to the same degree, people don't churn out at nearly the rate because they've actually paid a percentage of their upfront total contract. And so they don't wanna lose that money. And so you get the ancillary commitment that comes as a result of that. The third piece is the service that's actually being offered. And so what I mean by that is that because we were selling the large group plus one-on-one nutrition and accountability for the majority of clients, you now have a one-on-one relationship with every one of those clients. And for anyone who's ever done personal training compared to large group, you know it's a stay with you because it's easy to quit a gym membership, it's hard to quit a relationship. And that's what we're building here. The fifth thing that the diagnostic sale allowed us to do is ease your operations because you don't have to do the flip sale that happens later. It actually makes it an easier, you don't have to have nearly as many sales appointments. You have half as many sales appointments because you're selling the EFT on the front end.
